svg.title: Gatekeeper installation via Flux: step-by-step process
svg.desc: Flowchart showing 8 sequential steps to install OPA Gatekeeper into a Kubernetes cluster via Flux GitOps, from bootstrap through to active policy enforcement.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does flux bootstrap do and what does it create in the repo?')
sendPrompt('How does Flux pick up the opa-gatekeeper kustomization from the cluster path?')
sendPrompt('What are the three resources the opa-gatekeeper kustomization applies and why does order matter?')
sendPrompt('How does the Flux helm-controller fetch and cache the Gatekeeper chart?')
sendPrompt('What does Helm install during the Gatekeeper chart installation and what CRDs are created?')
sendPrompt('What do the Gatekeeper admission webhooks actually intercept and what is the check-ignore-label webhook for?')
sendPrompt('How does a ConstraintTemplate compile Rego into the OPA engine and what is the difference between a ConstraintTemplate and a Constraint?')
g.text: Rego policies compiled into OPA engine

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does active Gatekeeper enforcement look like — audit vs deny modes and how do violations surface?')
